---
id: explain-decision
title: "Explain a specific decision result for an entity"
description: "Returns a full explanation of a decision — why it fired or did not fire, the concept value that was evaluated, the threshold or label applied, and the contribution of each input signal. Supports both boolean and categorical decision outputs."
sidebar_label: "Explain a specific decision result for an entity"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/memintel-app-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as=&#123;"h1"&#125;
  className=&#123;"openapi__heading"&#125;
  children=&#123;"Explain a specific decision result for an entity"&#125;
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method=&#123;"post"&#125;
  path=&#123;"/decisions/explain"&#125;
  context=&#123;"endpoint"&#125;
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a full explanation of a decision — why it fired or did not fire, the concept value that was evaluated, the threshold or label applied, and the contribution of each input signal. Supports both boolean and categorical decision outputs.

  id=&#123;"request"&#125;
  as=&#123;"h2"&#125;
  className=&#123;"openapi-tabs__heading"&#125;
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
